pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads the opengeos Landsat tif to this location.
Verified via export_result.sh which primarily checks this exact file path for the DIMAP output.
Verified via export_result.sh which primarily checks this exact file path for the ENVI header.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real, non-synthetic Landsat multi-band GeoTIFF downloaded from the opengeos dataset repository, placing it at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The verification export scripts expect the final products to be generated at /home/ga/snap_exports/burn_analysis.dim (for BEAM-DIMAP format) and /home/ga/snap_exports/burn_analysis.hdr (for ENVI format).
